rationale: Issue split + Improvement; renaming acceptAPIVersion2 field for stable API, proactive spec-rollout not a driver bug.
Vendoring Fedora RPM spec file; pure build/packaging improvement, no spec area involved.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1638; adding test to verify session unpinning on non-transaction operations.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1685; adding unpinning transaction test for read operations, test infrastructure work.
Issue split + Improvement; implementing session unpinning after all abortTransaction attempts, proactive spec rollout.
Issue split + Improvement; removing xtrace from CI shell scripts, build tooling change only.
Issue split + Improvement; updating mongocryptd serverSelectionTimeoutMS, CSFLE spec rollout not a prior bug.
Assertion crash when speculative SCRAM auth fails with network error; implementation crash, no specific spec rule violated.
CI/Evergreen configuration to run integration tests in versioned API tasks; CI plumbing, not driver behavior.
Issue split + Improvement; rotating Atlas dev testing credentials, CI/ops task with no driver behavior.
Issue split + Improvement; using hello command when API version declared, proactive stable API spec rollout.
Issue split + Improvement; requiring Stable API options on getMore and transaction commands, proactive spec rollout.
Issue split + Improvement; removing deprecated slaveOK URI option, proactive spec cleanup rollout.
Issue split + Improvement; implementing time-series collection support, new feature spec rollout.
Issue split + Improvement; implementing DBRef handling per spec guidance, proactive rollout, no violation.
Bug: unified test runner only appends sessions for 3 operations; incomplete test runner implementation needs fixing.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1130; converting CRUD v2 spec tests to unified test format, test infrastructure work.
Issue split + Improvement; CI configuration to test against MongoDB 5.0 servers, CI plumbing.
Issue split + Improvement; using hello command for monitoring when supported, SDAM spec rollout.
Issue split + Improvement; exposing document validation failure reason, proactive spec feature rollout.
CI infrastructure upgrade to Ubuntu 18.04; no driver behavior or spec area involved.
Issue split + Improvement; stable API connection examples for docs, documentation task.
Issue split + Improvement; bumping maxWireVersion for MongoDB 5.0, routine version constant update.
Bug using strerror() on h_errno instead of hstrerror(); C stdlib misuse in DNS error message, no spec rule on message text.
Issue split + Improvement; adding 'let' option to aggregate command, proactive CRUD spec feature rollout.
CVE-2021-32050: auth command bodies published to command listeners; command monitoring spec requires redaction of sensitive auth commands.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1653; adding test for security-sensitive command monitoring event redaction, test infrastructure work.
Improvement; implementing load balancer MongoClient configuration spec, new feature rollout with test resyncing.
Bug: OpenSSL RAND_bytes duplicate values for forked processes; platform-specific random number entropy issue, not spec rule.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1828; removing insertedCount from test assertions and improving $$unsetOrMatches usage.
Improvement; implementing load balancer session behavior (disable expiration, always enable sessions), new feature rollout.
Improvement; accepting NULL as opts in mongoc_gridfs_bucket_find(), API ergonomics change, no spec rule requires this.
GridFS spec requires find to forward opts to underlying find; C driver does not forward opts as the spec requires.
Improvement; implementing prose tests for new snapshot reads specification in C driver test suite.
Issue split + Improvement; raising client error for snapshot sessions on <5.0 servers, proactive spec rollout.
Issue split + Improvement; disabling writes on snapshot sessions per spec requirement, proactive spec rollout.
SDAM spec explicitly warns against using maxWireVersion from monitor; driver uses monitor value causing racy wire version checks.
Improvement; implementing load balancer SDAM changes (new topology type, disable monitoring), new feature rollout.
Improvement; load balancer server selection always returns single server, new feature spec rollout.
Improvement; implementing load balancer connection pooling handshake field, new feature spec rollout.
Bug: gcc truncation warning in strncpy() call causing build error; no spec area involved.
killcursors_deprecated command monitoring test failing on new servers; test needs update for server behavior change.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1840; updating tests to not rely on deprecated OP_KILL_CURSORS and legacy wire opcodes.
Improvement; implementing load balancer error handling (SDAM interaction, serviceId, generation number), new feature rollout.
Improvement; adding serviceId to command monitoring events for load balancer, new feature spec rollout.
Improvement; implementing unified test runner changes and adding load balancer integration tests.
Causal Consistency spec changed: causalConsistency must not default true when snapshot is true; driver was not updated.
GridFS requires uploadDate as epoch milliseconds; driver uses monotonic microseconds producing wildly wrong dates.
Improvement; adding Evergreen CI tasks for load balanced deployment testing, test infrastructure setup.
Improvement; adding C API to copy/destroy topology description objects so PHP binding can implement SDAM monitoring.
